message:
bd-ml2r.9.2: add centrality tier CSS classes to SVG node output

- Add lookup_centrality_tier helper function
- Pass node_centrality data to render_node
- Add fm-node-centrality-{high,medium,low} CSS classes to nodes
- Update golden SVG snapshots with new centrality classes

Enables semantic styling of nodes based on graph centrality analysis.
Nodes in the top 20% get "high", bottom 20% get "low", rest get "medium".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
